inputs.label: Driver Sprocket Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the driving sprocket.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the driving sprocket.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zähne auf dem antreibenden Ritzel.

inputs.label: Driven Sprocket Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the driven sprocket.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the driven sprocket.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zähne auf dem angetriebenen Ritzel.

inputs.label: Chain Pitch
inputs.businessContext: Nominal pitch of the roller chain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal pitch of the roller chain.

inputs.label: Center Distance
inputs.businessContext: Desired center distance between sprocket centers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired center distance between sprocket centers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişli merkezleri arasında istenen merkez mesafesi.

formulas.chainLengthMm: (2 * centerDistance / pitch + (driverTeeth + drivenTeeth) / 2 + ((drivenTeeth - driverTeeth) ** 2 * pitch) / (4 * Math.PI ** 2 * centerDistance)) * pitch
formulas.chainLengthPitches: 2 * centerDistance / pitch + (driverTeeth + drivenTeeth) / 2 + ((drivenTeeth - driverTeeth) ** 2 * pitch) / (4 * Math.PI ** 2 * centerDistance)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
